message:
fix: allow ctrl+c to quit during time-travel input

Previously, ctrl+c was blocked when the time-travel input prompt was
shown because the input handler ran before the global ctrl+c handler.
Now ctrl+c is explicitly checked and passed through to ensure users
can always force quit.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
